reviews.review_description: I love this app, I'd just like another element. Can you find something else from Kung Fu training and add it. I would buy it in a heartbeat
It was the best game that has training i also turned Asian
Very good workout
fun game
Im loving it!

reviews.review_title: Really fun! Just one minor issue.
reviews.review_description: This was a really fun demo! It was really close to being five stars, but in my opinion, it just wasn’t difficult enough. I wish it was easier to learn and harder to master. I feel like all of the difficulty was at the very beginning of the game, but then once you learn how to play, it’s just too easy after that. However, it didn’t bother me too much, and it did made me feel like a fricking kung fu master. I just wish it was a bit harder.
The devs are really nice giving people the chance to get a key to the full game. Never had a workout and had this much fun
Doesn’t recognize my block so practically not playable

developer_response.body:
Sorry you are having issues with your block. It'll be very hard for me to provide any tips with so little information, so feel free to email me at support@fieldof.vision with more details. 
As a general rule though,  the entire surface of the bracer (and slightly more) are where you should be blocking. The low blocks can be harder so make sure you pay more attention to how you do them.
Also make sure you check the tutorial again and see exactly how the blocks work.

reviews.review_title: Cool and fun way to exercise
reviews.review_description: I didn't think this game would be this fun to play. This helps me keep in shape for Taekwondo during this quarantine and to help me focus. With the weekly challenges, it makes the game even more challenging and fun. Overall: 10/10

Really good game for cardio training or warming up before other activities.

This game definetly will improve Your reflex. It forces You to move short distances while trying to hit or dodge targets. Competetive side is making player to focus for better score, which translates to more demanding excerciseing, equals more burned calories, not mentioning a lot of fun, because it's obvious;)

I would change tutorial a little bit, because timing (when to hit, when to block) marker is not clear, so when You get advices in the end of round, it's hard to understand mechanics of the game.

I’m new to VR after just getting one recently and I can not stop playing this game. It makes me feel like I’m actually learning kung fu. I would totally recommend this game to anymore looking for a challenge. I love it!!
THIS GAME IS THE BEST GAME TO MAKE YOU TRAIN, ALSO GREAT FOR EXERSICES, ALSO GREAT FUN ONE OF THE BEST GAMES SO DOWNLOAD NOW
This game is really good! So far I’m having a lot of fun playing so far. It’s pretty hard but a lot of fun!

reviews.review_title: Was looking for martial arts game
reviews.review_description:
when we got quest2 my first app of interest was to find a martial arts game. I couldn’t find anything, till I scrolled main page of applab and CKF demo came in my life. 

This game keeps you moving, wanting to get on that leaderboard each week and sweating profusely. As I played more, I realised you really need to get speed and force in your hits and blocks to get a better score. Personally I hope the full game gets an update with versing human figure instead of just the pole, but not saying i dont enjoy the training pole. 

Few bugs here and there: 
• Sometimes the round will finish and the score won’t apepar with no menu so I have to reinstall the app almost every day after 5+ runs. 
•If I swing wide maybe out my guardian a freezing sound effect plays and the round will end early - which sometimes was good when I’m certain I block, yet it registers my hand, so I’d reset the game for perfect score lol.
•Once the game had a green glow on and around models like when you finish a round which was fixed with restarting the game.

One note, maybe it’s just me, but the spam pad feels a little small and to get higher score, more punches, I would hit my controllers together on accident.

Still with these bugs, I keep coming back to CKF again and again and again. Highly recommend this game. To get higher score on leaderboard I have now been offering my flatmates $10 to beat my record for that full game key.
In love with this game been playing all day good job

The demo has two short levels to play. It is a bit hard to judge the game by the short demo but it looks like the kind of game I can enjoy. This can be a good exercise and I think you can even develop reflex by playing this game. One minor issue I had was I always get the feedback that my punch and block are too slow. I tried several times with slightly different timings but always get the same feedback. It would have been great if the tutorial included instructions on how to time punches and blocks. Overall, I think it is a decent game and has good potential
Fun and a good workout 😅 but look out, you may knock out people around you🤣

I LOVE this game. I've been a martial artist my entire life, so this game was right down my alley. The combination of blocking, punching, dodging and ducking is so much fun. It can be a great workout too. You'll get out of it what you put into it. Throw hard punches and blocks. Use footwork to evade and you'll work up a nice sweat. What I love is how much it trains your reflex and reaction time. Those targets start coming pretty fast. It motivates you to keep going cuz getting hit by those swords really pisses me off. Highly recommend this game. You'll be so focused, you'll forget you're working out.

Like others, I was hoping for a quick fun game to get a little exercise but did not expect it to really be a challenge. Especially since this is just a demo.
However, I already spent around 2 hours jumping, punching and blocking trying to get a better score. The game mechanics are simple but work perfectly. Already with the two available levels in the demo you get a good feeling about how everything works. The weekly challenge is great since it keeps you coming back for more. 

I highly recommend everyone who wants to get some exercise in VR to try this game.

I  love this game. At first I thought it was just going to be a normal kung fu trainer but it actually surprised me how good and fun this game really is. It is also a big workout and is great for if you want to lose calories and train
you’re ninja like skills in a fun way.
